description: Using jsdom success as browser proof
body:
DOM-like test environments do not prove layout, navigation, canvas, network, or hydration behavior in a real browser. Treat this as insufficient evidence for user-visible changes. Safer path: add a browser smoke or dev/build verification when UI runtime behavior changed.

Use only as a diagnostic do-not-use signal; do not expose this as positive strategy, methodology, knowledge, skill, or memory.
